name: BEST BUY CO INC
summary: PART I . Unless the context otherwise requires, the terms we, us, our and the company in this Annual Report on Form 10-K refer to Best Buy Co., Inc. and, as applicable, its consolidated subsidiaries. Any references to our website addresses do not constitute incorporation by reference of the information contained on the websites.
